name: Repetitive strain from job in Sandy, file claim?

mainEntity.name: Repetitive strain from job in Sandy, file claim?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, cumulative trauma claims covered if work caused.**[4]

Utah recognizes gradual injuries; report when disabling.

- Medical links to duties.
- 180-day report from diagnosis.
- Common in offices/warehouses.

Specialist opinion key.
